What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A grey fox-like character wearing brown goggles sits near a stainless steel kitchen sink while text overlays list specific ingredient measurements above the items. Several small glass bowls contain sliced white onions, pink ham strips, and green cucumbers arranged on a blue and white striped cloth. A white squeeze bottle with a red cap and a green noodle package rest on the counter nearby.

question: Describe what is happening
canonical_answer: A silver metal pot with a black handle sits on a black stovetop surface filled with vigorously boiling water. A hand sprinkles white granules into the pot before placing dry spaghetti noodles into the bubbling liquid while white text instructions overlay the scene. An anthropomorphic fox character wearing steampunk-style goggles watches from the bottom right corner of the frame.
